content.title: GitLab to GitHub Mirror Manager
content.short_description: A comprehensive Python CLI tool that automates GitLab to GitHub repository mirroring with bidirectional synchronization, interactive project selection, and state persistence.
content.description: I designed and implemented the complete mirroring system from scratch, including the modular architecture with separate configuration, CLI, and manager components. I built the interactive console interface using console-menu, implemented comprehensive error handling for API operations, created the JSON registry system for state persistence, and established the 2-way synchronization workflow that adds local git remotes for bidirectional development.
content.role: I designed and implemented the complete Lab2Hub mirroring system as the sole developer, creating the entire Python CLI application from scratch. I built the modular architecture with separate configuration, CLI, and manager components, implemented the interactive console interface using console-menu, and developed comprehensive error handling for all API operations. I created the JSON registry system for state persistence and established the 2-way synchronization workflow that adds local git remotes for bidirectional development. I also integrated both GitLab and GitHub APIs, implemented environment variable configuration management, and ensured the tool follows Python best practices with proper testing and documentation.

achievements: Streamlines repository mirroring workflow from manual multi-step process to single automated command
Eliminates duplicate mirror setup through intelligent registry tracking
Enables bidirectional synchronization for seamless development across platforms
Provides comprehensive error handling that prevents partial configurations
Supports scalable management of multiple GitLab projects through interactive selection

screenshots: Interactive CLI menu showing project selection with [NEW]/[MIRRORED] status indicators
Architecture diagram showing GitLab → GitHub mirroring flow with local git remote setup
Console output demonstration of successful mirror creation process
JSON registry file structure showing tracked project metadata
Error handling flowchart for various failure scenarios
